info.title: basic-trace
info.description: Tool for basic .NET Core performance tracing

options.name: --process
options.description:
Required. The ID or name of the process
to collect the trace from.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The output path for the collected trace
data. Defaults to 'trace.nettrace'.

options.name: --buffersize
options.description:
Sets the size of the in-memory circular
buffer in megabytes. Defaults to 256 MB.
